source_filing: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023 (filed 2023-11-03), MD&A — Net Sales
original_text: The Company's total net sales decreased 3% or $11.0 billion during 2023 compared to 2022. The weakness in foreign currencies relative to the U.S. dollar accounted for more than the entire year-over-year decrease in total net sales. [...] Services net sales increased 9% or $7.1 billion during 2023 compared to 2022 due to higher net sales across all lines of business.
modified_text: In fiscal 2023, Apple's total net sales declined versus the prior year even as its Services business continued to grow.
claim: In fiscal 2023, Apple's total net sales declined while its Services business continued to grow.
notes: Multi-claim / distributed evidence (HHEM-killer): the compound claim has two sub-assertions (total net sales declined; Services grew) supported by sentences located in DIFFERENT parts of the source. Both are backed -> supported. Tests that the verifier credits support found anywhere, unlike HHEM which false-negatived when fed only one supporting sentence.
